description:
Re-bless CLIF expectations for every fixture where a narrow spec exists with non-`any` arg Descrs or return Descr. Expected diff:
  - removed `sshr_imm v, 3` at narrow spec entry uses of typed params
  - removed `ishl_imm 3 ; bor_imm 1` at narrow spec returns when return Descr is int-only
  - caller emits `iconst N` (raw) instead of `iconst (N<<3)|1` (tagged) when feeding raw-int params
  - one residual `box_int` survives at the narrow-callee → any-key-cont seam (documented; eliminated by the cont follow-up)

JIT + AOT identical (same compile_fn). Interp unaffected.

Acceptance for add1.fz: `add1_s3` body is `iadd_imm v0, 1 ; <coerce-for-cont> ; return`; main passes `iconst 41` to add1_s3 (not `iconst 329`).
title: VR.4 follow-up STEP.5: Fixture-matrix bless
